channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kennedy Center misses deadline to remove Trump's name as government seeks short delay
item.description: The Trump administration still faces a deadline of Friday to remove Trumpâs name from the building.

item.title: Examining a possible U.S.-Iran deal and the war's economic effects
item.description: The U.S. and Iran are reportedly nearing an agreement to begin talks on a lasting peace deal. CBS News national security contributor...

item.title: Video: Utah police break down apartment doors to rescue residents from fire
item.description: Dramatic footage shows officers entering flames to save people, waking children and adults from their beds to lead them to safety.

item.title: Trump says U.S. killed Tren de Aragua leader in airstrike in Venezuela
item.description: President Trump announced Friday that the U.S. military killed Niño Guerrero, the alleged leader of the Venezuela-based Tren de Aragua gang.
